# K8s RBAC Manager Config

This template provides the K8s CRD and Configuration for an RBAC management system using Config Connector.

## Architecture

This template deploys an RBAC management system that utilizes Config Connector to manage Kubernetes Role-Based Access Control resources as Google Cloud resources.
